graduation_project.title: Automated Lesion Segmentation for Advanced Pre-Surgical Evaluation in Epilepsy
graduation_project.description: Built two deep learning models — a synthetic data-trained 3D UNet and nnU-Net — for automated FCD II lesion segmentation in FLAIR MRI, supporting pre-surgical evaluation in drug-resistant epilepsy.

msc.specialization: AI tools for neonatal brain imaging · AI²Lab

research_block.title: AI²Lab — Dr. Roberto Souza
research_block.description: Deep learning methods for neonatal brain MRI analysis, developing AI-assisted tools for clinical decision support in neonatal care.
